channel.title: compact strings on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in compact strings on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts

item.title: Reclaim 25% of Java Heap Memory and Lower Your Cloud Bills
item.description: Reclaim 25% of Java Heap Memory and Lower Your Cloud Bills You can save up to 25% of heap memory using latest java which means less cloud bills Do you know that you can save up to 25% of your heap memory and your cloud bills without any effort? Well, that’s true. Many exciting features have been added to the latest Java recently, and I’m going to cover one of them in this article, so please bear with me.
